title: Topless Nether
description: A datapack which removes the roof of The Nether!
body:
# Topless Nether
A datapack which removes The Nether's roof.

**The datapack had almost no playtesting, expect bugs.**

## What does the datapack?
The datapack changes the vanilla dimension files to remove the roof.

**Important: Datapack does not changes the structure files! That means structures will not spawn than y > 128, in practice this number is even lower.**

## Q&N

<details>
<summary>How do I locate the structures?</summary>
As I said: the structures does not spawn above y > 128, for finding the structures, go to the deeps.
</details>
<details>
<summary>When for Minecraft 1.X.X?</summary>
Never. Well, I might update the datapack for newer versions, but it's very unlikely. You can update it by yourself! you're allowed to edit the datapack. You can use tools such as Misode (https://misode.github.io)
</details>
<details>
<summary>Where I can find full of the pack.png? 👉👈</summary>
No.
</details>
